text: This goo is liquid and solid at the same time — and you can punch it! Meet oobleck, a non-Newtonian fluid made of just cornstarch and water. When poured, it flows like a liquid... but strike it hard, and it becomes solid! This shear thickening effect makes oobleck fascinating and fun! Check this out: the harder you hit, the firmer it gets! Perfect for some science comedy. Ready to try oobleck yourself? Hit that follow for more wild science!
